title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Bolloré Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!
